dry_run_checks: publish evidence success and one committed publish
article is published, public, and indexable
SEO title length is at most 60 characters
canonical URL planning uses seo_intel.public_canonical_host and never app.url/ops host as public canonical authority
sitemap and llms eligibility is observed without mutation
URL Truth article support is reported without write
Search Channel and IndexNow article bridge support is reported without enqueue or submission

canonical_host_policy.app_url_usage: not used for public canonical URL planning

adapter_gap_behavior.url_truth_article_page_type_not_supporte: reported as readiness gap only when the installed URL Truth artifact service does not support article page type; no DB write is attempted
adapter_gap_behavior.post_publish_search_bridge_article_evide: reported as readiness gap; no queue enqueue or live submission is attempted

post_dry_run_gates: URL Truth write requires a separate exact approval
Search Channel enqueue requires a separate exact approval
IndexNow live submit requires a separate exact approval
